query:
Research the company "worldpac".

Find the following about the prospect's company: (1) Most recent quarterly or annual revenue and growth rate; (2) Any recent P&L misses, earnings shortfalls, or revenue guidance cuts in the past 12 months; (3) Recent CEO changes, leadership transitions, or announced strategic reviews; (4) Company scale (Fortune 500 status, revenue tier, market cap); (5) Business structure and key functional areas (especially media/marketing, production/manufacturing, pricing, distribution); (6) Recent or upcoming product/platform launches; (7) Public commentary on operational challenges, margin pressure, or execution gaps; (8) Cost-cutting or restructuring initiatives announced or underway. Focus on recent earnings releases, investor presentations, press releases, and industry reporting.

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Worldpac is a B2B automotive parts distributor that recently transitioned to an independent, private equity-backed company following its $1.5 billion acquisition by Carlyle in November 2024. The company generates approximately $2.1 billion in annual revenue and has spent the last 18 months executing significant leadership changes, platform migrations, and strategic partnerships to optimize its operations following its divestiture from Advance Auto Parts. 

**Financial Scale and Valuation**
*   **Revenue and Profitability:** In the 12 months ending June 30, 2024, Worldpac generated approximately $2.1 billion in revenue and $100 million in EBITDA [Advance Auto Parts to Sell Distributor Worldpac to PE Firm for $1.5B - Modern Distribution Management](https://www.mdm.com/news/operations/mergers-acquisitions/advance-auto-parts-to-sell-distributor-worldpac-to-pe-firm-for-1-5b/). *Note: Third-party business databases present conflicting estimates for 2025/2026, citing annual revenue figures between $647.3 million and $1.2 billion* [WORLDPAC - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/worldpac-inc/117506050).
*   **Valuation:** Advance Auto Parts sold Worldpac to global investment firm Carlyle for $1.5 billion in cash, with the transaction closing on November 4, 2024 [Carlyle Completes Worldpac Acquisition from Advance Auto Parts | Carlyle](https://www.carlyle.com/media-room/news-release-archive/carlyle-completes-worldpac-acquisition-advance-auto-parts). 
*   **Credit Risk:** Worldpac's default probability peaked at 2.001 in June 2023 but has since improved, declining to a low of 0.779 as of July 2025 [WORLDPAC - martini.ai Research](https://martini.ai/pages/research/WORLDPAC-4eb63cfed0be3abda905d1df28308e26).
*   **Headcount:** As of late 2024, the company employed more than 5,000 team members [Advance Auto Parts Selling Worldpac To Carlyle For $1.5 Billion](https://pulse2.com/advance-auto-parts-selling-worldpac-to-carlyle-for-1-5-billion/), and the team size expanded by approximately 5% over the past year [WORLDPAC: Revenue, Worth, Valuation & Competitors 2025](https://compworth.com/company/worldpac).

**Leadership Transitions and Strategic Reviews**
Worldpac has undergone a complete executive overhaul following its transition to a standalone entity:
*   **CEO Transition:** Effective November 4, 2024, John Hamilton was appointed President and CEO, while former President Bob Cushing transitioned to the role of Strategic Advisor [Carlyle Completes Worldpac Acquisition from Advance Auto Parts | Carlyle](https://www.carlyle.com/media-room/news-release-archive/carlyle-completes-worldpac-acquisition-advance-auto-parts).
*   **Commercial Leadership:** Dominic Garcia took over as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) on January 1, 2026, succeeding retiring CCO David Heine [WORLDPAC Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/worldpac/5a1d846b24000024005edcc0).
*   **Strategic Context:** The divestiture from Advance Auto Parts was initiated due to activist investor pressure aimed at streamlining operations. Activists identified Worldpac's wholesale distribution model as a "drag on margins and flexibility" for its former parent company [Advance Auto Parts' Strategic Turnaround and the Implications of the Worldpac Sale for Shareholders](https://www.ainvest.com/news/advance-auto-parts-strategic-turnaround-implications-worldpac-sale-shareholders-2511/). Following the sale, Advance Auto Parts reported a net discrete tax benefit of $126 million in Q1 2025 tied to capital loss deductions from the transaction [Advance Auto (AAP) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Transcript | The Motley Fool](https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2025/05/22/advance-auto-aap-q1-2025-earnings-call-transcript/).

**Business Structure and Functional Areas**
Worldpac operates a primarily B2B business model focused on wholesale distribution of original equipment (OE) and aftermarket parts to professional independent service centers [WORLDPAC - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/worldpac-inc/117506050).
*   **Distribution & Supply Chain:** The company manages an inventory of over 160,000 part numbers from more than 45 car manufacturers [Carlyle Completes Worldpac Acquisition from Advance Auto Parts | Carlyle](https://www.carlyle.com/media-room/news-release-archive/carlyle-completes-worldpac-acquisition-advance-auto-parts). Reports on its footprint vary; corporate materials cite a network of over 320 strategically located facilities across North America [Our Company | www.worldpac.com], including 8 major Distribution Centers (DCs) [Worldpac - Products, Competitors, Financials, Employees, Headquarters Locations](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/worldpac), while secondary databases report 182 locations [WORLDPAC - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/worldpac-inc/117506050). 
*   **Marketing & Customer Retention:** Worldpac maintains a three-year agreement with Demandforce Inc. to provide Demandforce D3 marketing and communications software to its customers to drive retention [WORLDPAC and Demandforce Announce Strategic Partnership for the Automotive Aftermarket](https://www.counterman.com/worldpac-and-demandforce-announce-strategic-partnership-for-the-automotive-aftermarket/).
*   **IT & Infrastructure:** The company's tech stack includes Git, NoSQL, SQL, Docker, Snowflake, Confluence, and Jira [WORLDPAC - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/worldpac-inc/117506050).

**Recent Platforms, Launches, and Initiatives**
*   **Platform Migration:** As part of its separation from Advance Auto Parts, Worldpac migrated to a new Oracle platform for managing purchase orders and invoicing, which went live on July 14, 2025 [What's Changing? | www2.worldpac.com](https://www.worldpac.com/what-s-changing).
*   **Strategic Partnerships:** Effective April 1, 2026, Worldpac joined The Pronto Network to collaborate on supply chain, technical education, and member support [Worldpac Joins The Pronto Network | Modern Tire Dealer](https://www.moderntiredealer.com/suppliers/article/55369791/worldpac-joins-the-pronto-network).
*   **E-Commerce:** The company continues to utilize its exclusive "speedDIAL" online catalog and fulfillment software, which supports over 1,000,000 import and domestic brand applications [WORLDPAC | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/worldpac).
*   **Upcoming Events & Restructuring:** Worldpac is scheduled to move its corporate offices in September 2026, and will host its biannual Supplier & Training Expo (STX) in 2026 at National Harbor, Maryland [WORLDPAC - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/worldpac-inc/117506050).

**Gaps and Limitations**
Based on the provided findings, the following requested information could not be verified:
*   **Recent P&L Misses or Guidance Cuts:** Because Worldpac is now a private portfolio company under Carlyle, standalone quarterly earnings shortfalls, P&L misses, or revenue guidance cuts for the past 6-12 months are not publicly disclosed in the provided data.
*   **Cost-Cutting Initiatives:** Aside from the planned office move in September 2026 and the historical activist pressure regarding margin drag, no specific recent cost-cutting or restructuring programs (e.g., layoffs, facility closures) were detailed in the findings.
*   **Public Market Scale:** Fortune 500 status and market capitalization are not applicable or available, as Worldpac is a privately held entity.
